zh.lifeSummary: 當Anthony Browne於1340年4月1日出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯坦福時，他的父親John Browne IV25歲，母親Alice Swinstead19歲。他和Eleanor Poher至少有2個兒子。他去世於1398年9月16日在英國英格蘭素瑞布洛可哈姆享年58歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯坦福。

nameMeanings.name: Browne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably also an Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Braune   or   Braun  .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

variants.name: Brown
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: generally a nickname referring to the color of the hair or complexion, Middle English br(o)un, from Old English brūn or Old French brun. This word is occasionally found in Old French, Middle English and Old Norse as a personal name or byname (Middle English personal name Brun, Broun, ancient Germanic Bruno, Old English Brūn, or possibly Old Norse Brúnn or Brúni). Brun- was also an ancient Germanic name-forming element. Some instances of Old English Brūn as a personal name may therefore be short forms of compound names such as Brūngar, Brūnwine, etc. As a Scottish and Irish name, it sometimes represents a translation of Gaelic Donn (see below). Brown (including in the senses below) is the fourth most frequent surname in the US. It is also very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below).
Irish and Scottish: adopted for Ó Duinn (see Dunn ) or for any of the many Irish and Scottish Gaelic names containing the element donn ‘brown-haired’ (also meaning ‘chieftain’), for example Donahue .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

nameMeanings.name: Anthony
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual English form of the old Roman family name Antonius, which is of uncertain (probably Etruscan) origin. The spelling with -th- (not normally reflected in the pronunciation) represents a learned but erroneous attempt to associate it with Greek anthos ‘flower’. In the post-classical period it was a common name, borne by various early saints, most notably a 3rd-century Egyptian hermit monk, who is regarded as the founder of Christian monasticism.

en.lifeSummary: When Anthony Browne was born on 1 April 1340, in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Browne IV, was 25 and his mother, Alice Swinstead, was 19. He had at least 2 sons with Eleanor Poher. He died on 16 September 1398, in Brockham, Surrey, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58, and was buried in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anthony Browne est né le 1 avril 1340, à Stamford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Browne IV, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Alice Swinstead, avait 19 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Eleanor Poher. Il est décédé le 16 septembre 1398, à Brockham, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Stamford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anthony Browne am 1. April 1340 in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Browne IV 25 und seine Mutter Alice Swinstead 19. Er hatte mit Eleanor Poher mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 16. September 1398 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Brockham, Surrey, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anthony Browne è nato il il 1 aprile 1340 nel Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Browne IV, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Alice Swinstead, aveva 19 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Eleanor Poher. Morì il 16 settembre 1398, nel Brockham, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Anthony Browneが1340年4月1日にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタムフォードで生まれた時，父John Browne IVは25歳，母Alice Swinsteadは19歳であった。彼はEleanor Poherとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1398年9月16日にイギリスイギリススリーブロックハムで58歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタムフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anthony Browne(이)가 1340년 4월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스타퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Browne IV(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Swinstead(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Eleanor Poher(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1398년 9월 16일 영국 잉글랜드 수리 브록함에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스타퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.1 April 1340–16 September 1398: 1 de abril de 1340–16 de setembro de 1398
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anthony Browne nasceu em 1 de abril de 1340, em Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Browne IV, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Alice Swinstead, tinha 19 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Eleanor Poher. Ele faleceu em 16 de setembro de 1398, em Brockham, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anthony Browne родился 1 апреля 1340 г. в местности стамфорд, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Browne IV было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Swinstead, 19. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Eleanor Poher. Он умер 16 сентября 1398 г. в местности броккхам, сурри, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности стамфорд, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.
